action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 19 test failed due to IndexError when accessing result['color'] (renderer returns tensor not dict). Previous iterations also had device mismatch in custom ray generation. Need to (1) determine correct renderer output type, (2) fix device handling for ray generation, (3) confirm LPIPS improvement before updating predict.py and submitting eval. Decision: Write a minimal test script that inspects renderer output and fixes device issues by explicitly putting all tensors on GPU. Then test custom rendering on 1 val object, compute LPIPS, and if low, update predict.py accordingly for eval submission.
